name: Incident Triage
prompt:
Triage an incident by gathering four independent signals, then synthesize a verdict. Run four independent probes, each a different tool over a different source, then build the triage report:

1. python3 tools/scan_logs.py signals/logs log_scan.json
2. python3 tools/diff_config.py signals/baseline.conf signals/current.conf config_drift.json
3. python3 tools/check_thresholds.py signals/metrics.json threshold_check.json
4. python3 tools/correlate_alerts.py signals/alerts.json alert_correlation.json

The four probes are independent and may run in any order (or together). After all four reports exist, run the synthesizer:

   python3 tools/build_triage.py

This reads the four signal reports and writes triage_report.json.

criteria.description: All four signal reports and triage_report.json are created
Each signal report's non-fingerprint values match the expected probe output
Each signal fingerprint matches, verifying the CPU-bound probe actually ran
triage_report.json is valid with a correct combined fingerprint and severity verdict

origin.notes: Genuine instruction-level-parallelism task: four heterogeneous probes (logs, config diff, metric thresholds, alert correlation) over four different sources run in one turn, then a merge. Cannot be expressed as a single fan-out loop over a collection.
